steps.title: Punctuate Carolyn Servid
steps.content: The phrase author of Of Landscape and Longing is extra information about Carolyn Servid. Keep essayist directly attached to her name, then use a comma after the name before the appositive.

steps.title: Reject misplaced commas
steps.content: Choice A lacks the comma after the name. Choice B incorrectly separates essayist from the name. Choice D makes the same separation and adds an unnecessary final comma. The punctuation with no comma before the name and one after it fits. The answer is C.
